case_title: SUZANNE COPPOLA VS. DOT429, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF COPPOLA, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT DOT429, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
